perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a male host wearing a flat cap and glasses, speaking animatedly toward the camera; a split screen shows a Tesla Cybertruck below him. (2) Transition to a shot of the host holding two smartphones in front of a display case at a mobile phone store. (3) The scene shifts to grainy, night-time footage of a vehicle crash and fire, with text overlays describing the incident. (4) The host returns to a studio setting, using hand gestures and diagrams to explain the Cybertruck's electronic door buttons on the B and C pillars. (5) Graphic diagrams show how to manually release doors from the inside by pulling a cord hidden under decorative panels. (6) Footage of individuals attempting to break the Cybertruck's window with tools is shown to demonstrate its strength. (7) The host concludes with final thoughts and a serious expression.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, fast-tempo background music starts immediately; a male voice speaks in a fast-paced, energetic tone in Mandarin. (2) Sound of a car horn and a subtle fire-crackling sound effect plays during the crash footage. (3) A 'ting' sound effect emphasizes text appearing on screen. (4) Background music continues at a steady volume while the narrator explains technical details. (5) A sharp glass-shattering sound effect accompanies the footage of the window test. (6) Music persists until the end, fading slightly as the narrator finishes speaking.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '3c有意思tim哥' (3c interesting Tim) and 'miko 米可手機館' (Miko Mobile Phone Store) appear as permanent watermarks. (2) Hook Text: 'Cybertruck' and '致命的設計' (Fatal Design) appear in large, bold font. (3) Functional Text: '推薦大家買手機到米可' (Recommend everyone buy mobile phones at Miko). (4) Descriptive Text: '2024年11月 加州發生一起Cybertruck 酒駕自撞起火' (November 2024, California, a Cybertruck drunk driving self-collision fire occurred). (5) Explanatory Text: '(受困者在車內) 無法透過按壓按鈕 打開車門' ((Trapped people inside) Cannot open door by pressing button) and diagrams labeling B/C pillars.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro/Hook -> News Report -> Technical Explanation -> Promo -> Outro

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator (Tim哥), 1 secondary person shown briefly in the phone store/testing footage
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Adult male wearing a grey flat cap, round-rimmed glasses, and a light green t-shirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A mix of a blurred studio background, a mobile phone retail display with several smartphones (Vivo, realme), and dark night-time footage of a road accident.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Bright studio lighting for host segments; dark, natural night lighting for accident footage.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> News Incident -> Instructional Analysis -> Call to Action
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a cautionary tech commentary regarding a safety flaw in the Tesla Cybertruck's door design following a fatal accident. It explains the difficulty of manual exit during a power failure while simultaneously acting as a promotional vehicle for 'miko', a mobile phone store, through visual placement and direct recommendation.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct verbal recommendation to buy phones at 'Miko' and persistent branding on screen.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Host 'Tim哥''s signature greeting and fast-talking tech review style.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video successfully bridges general news/safety concerns with niche tech hardware analysis to maintain high engagement levels.
